turns.user_message: I tried to cheer myself up today, but it didn’t work at all. I just ended up feeling worse about it.
Every time I try to push past this feeling, it digs in deeper. I’m starting to think I can’t shake it.
My attempts to feel better now just remind me why I shouldn’t. It feels like I’m proving I deserve this.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This just started recently.
